notableMoments: Stunning debut in 2002 - beat defending champions France 1-0 in the opening match
Reached the quarter-finals on their World Cup debut (2002)
Papa Bouba Diop scored the winner vs France and celebrated with the iconic shirt dance
Eliminated in 2018 on fair play tiebreaker - the first team ever eliminated by this rule
Won the 2021 Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) for the first time
Sadio Mané became the face of Senegalese football in the 2020s
